description: A thin plastic plate with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a Kydex knife sheath, in order to carry a knife on your plate carrier or ballistic vest.  Can attach to vests with hook-and-loop mounts.

variants.description: A thin plastic fold with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a single Kydex knife sheath, to be worn on a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces.  Can be worn underneath other hook-and-loop equipment.  <variant:black>

A thin plastic fold with a set of screw holes and a hook-and-loop exterior.  Can hold a single Kydex knife sheath, to be worn on a plate carrier or a ballistic vest.  Attaches to hook-and-loop surfaces.  Can be worn underneath other hook-and-loop equipment.  <variant:coyote>

notes: length and width acquired from visual reference
